name: Primitive base fixed
statement: The primitive alphabet remains U={Q,B,L}; Q, B, and L are not renamed Weil generators and are not retuned.
regression_risk: S/T symbol collision; primitive relabeling; bare primitive comparison.

name: Orthad overset dual-lens
statement: The Orthad is an overset dual-lens readout with point chart OmegaPlus and dual successor-cochain chart OmegaMinus.

name: Same-chart collapse
statement: The old diagonal lens is preserved as the same-chart self-read/collapse subcase.
regression_risk: discarding the old trace or replacing it with a new gadget.

name: Cross-chart transfer
statement: Off-diagonal entries belong to transfer between complementary Orthad charts, not to a hand-admitted dense block inside one lens.
regression_risk: hand-admitted dense block; one-lens off-diagonal insertion.

name: Fourier generator
statement: K_N(r,s)=N^(-1/2) exp(-2πi r s/N) is generated as the cross-chart transfer coefficient for finite cyclic carrier A_N.
regression_risk: naming B/L dual seating as Fourier without derivation.

name: Gauss generator
statement: G_N(r)=exp(πi r²/N) is generated as the same-chart quadratic self-twist of the reverse transfer pairing on even carriers.
regression_risk: naming Q square seating as Gauss without derivation.

name: Shadow split
statement: Scalar mock-theta coefficients/readouts stay external; retained residue-orientation vectors and overset transfer/self-twist structure are carriable state.

name: Sealed comparison discipline
statement: Native Orthad objects must be derived and frozen before comparison against external classical targets.
